NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY KLETTER, CARY S.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT PETERS, KASSANDRA DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-09-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-24-2010
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CARY S. KLETTER, ESQ,. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-18-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-02-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF EVANS, BRENDA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-23-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-09-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-23-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
